# sigmoid(with:name:)

**Instance Method**

Computes the sigmoid operation on an input tensor.

## Declaration

```swift
func sigmoid(with tensor: MPSGraphTensor, name: String?) -> MPSGraphTensor
```

## Parameters

- **tensor**: The input tensor.
- **name**: The name for the operation.

## Return Value

A valid [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphTensor] object.
